use_cases: Premium call-to-action buttons with animated star particles on hover
Interactive buttons with sparkle effects for creator or media platforms
Decorative action buttons with gradient colors for SaaS landing pages
Engaging UI elements with particle animations for e-commerce checkout flows
ai_summary: A decorative button component featuring animated star particles that emit on hover, using a purple and blue gradient color palette with smooth rotation animations. Built with tsparticles library, this interactive button combines glass-morphism styling with particle effects to create a premium, engaging user experience for calls-to-action.
